dataModelingNotes: Hot path #1: fetch single order by (org_id, order_number) with all lines, current status, and open shipments in one round-trip under 75ms. Hot path #2: warehouse picker scans inventory by (warehouse_id, sku) with quantity and reserved qty; must not load order aggregates. Hot path #3: customer portal lists orders by customer_id sorted by placed_at desc (paginated, 25/page). Contract pricing is resolved at order placement time and line unit_price is frozen on the order line. ORDER_STATUS_HISTORY and SHIPMENT_EVENT are append-only audit streams; UI usually shows last 5 events inline but compliance exports need full history by order. Promotions apply to a subset of SKUs; catalog browse filters by category tree. Returns reference original order lines but have their own workflow state.
